tags.name: mu-accordion-item
tags.description:
Individual accordion item with an expandable content region.
Managed by `mu-accordion`; can also be used standalone.
---


### **Events:**
 - **accordion-toggle** - Dispatched when the item expands or collapses. Detail: `{ expanded: boolean }`.

attributes.name: expanded
attributes.description: Whether the content region is currently expanded.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Whether the item is disabled.

attributes.name: heading
attributes.description: Heading text displayed in the header button.

tags.name: mu-accordion
tags.description:
Accordion container that optionally enforces single-panel expansion.

Slotted children must be `mu-accordion-item` elements.
---

attributes.name: allowMultiple
attributes.description:
When true, multiple items may be expanded simultaneously.
When false (default), expanding one item collapses all others.

tags.name: mu-alert
tags.description:
Alert component for communicating feedback messages.
Uses role="alert" for error severity and role="status" for others.
---


### **Events:**
 - **mu-close** - Dispatched when the close button is clicked.

attributes.name: severity
attributes.description: Severity level controlling color, icon and ARIA role.

attributes.name: closeLabel
attributes.description:
When provided, renders a close button.
The button's aria-label is set to this value.

tags.name: mu-app-bar
tags.description:
Application top bar with three named slots: `start`, default, and `end`.
Renders as a sticky header.
---

attributes.name: elevation
attributes.description: Elevation level controlling box-shadow (0 = flat, 1 = default raised).

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Background color token or explicit CSS color.

attributes.name: fixed
attributes.description: Makes the app bar position:fixed so it stays at the top during scroll.

tags.name: mu-avatar
tags.description:
Minimal/MUI-style avatar component.
Can display an image or initials, supports size and color.
---

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: Avatar image URL (optional).

attributes.name: alt
attributes.description: Alt text for the image (for accessibility).

attributes.name: initials
attributes.description: Fallback initials if no image.

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Avatar size: 'small' | 'medium' | 'large'.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Predefined color: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error'.

tags.name: mu-badge
tags.description:
A badge component to display status descriptors or unread counts.
---

attributes.name: content
attributes.description: The content rendered within the badge.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: The color of the badge.

attributes.name: invisible
attributes.description: If true, the badge is hidden.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible label for the badge content. Defaults to 'Badge: [content]'.

tags.name: mu-breadcrumb-item
tags.description:
Individual breadcrumb item rendered as a list item.
Use inside a `mu-breadcrumb` container. Set `current` on the final item.
---

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: URL the breadcrumb navigates to. When omitted the item renders as plain text.

attributes.name: current
attributes.description:
When true marks this as the current page (aria-current="page").
The item is rendered without a link.

tags.name: mu-breadcrumb
tags.description:
Breadcrumb navigation container.
Wraps `mu-breadcrumb-item` elements in an accessible `nav > ol` structure.
---

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible label for the nav landmark.

tags.name: mu-button
tags.description:
Minimal/MUI-style button component.
Supports 3 sizes, 3 types, and predefined colors.
---

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Button size: 'small' | 'medium' | 'large'.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Button variant: 'contained' | 'outlined' | 'icon'.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Predefined color: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error'.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disabled state.

tags.name: mu-card
tags.description:
Card container component. Use slots for header, content, and actions.
---

tags.name: mu-card-header
tags.description:
Card header subcomponent. Use in the header slot of mu-card.
---

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Title text for the card header.

attributes.name: subtitle
attributes.description: Optional subtitle text.

tags.name: mu-card-content
tags.description:
Card content subcomponent. Use as the default slot of mu-card.
---

tags.name: mu-card-actions
tags.description:
Card actions subcomponent. Use in the actions slot of mu-card.
---

tags.name: mu-checkbox
tags.description:
Checkbox form component that participates in native HTML forms via ElementInternals.
Supports checked, indeterminate, and disabled states with full keyboard accessibility.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Dispatched when the checked state changes.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: Whether the checkbox is checked.

attributes.name: indeterminate
attributes.description: Tri-state: when true, overrides checked visually with a dash mark.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the checkbox, making it non-interactive.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name submitted with the form.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Value submitted to the form when checked.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Visible label rendered next to the checkbox. Falls back to default slot.

tags.name: mu-chip
tags.description:
Chip component for tags, attributes, and actions.
---


### **Events:**
 - **delete** - Dispatched when the delete button is clicked on a deletable chip.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Text label displayed in the chip.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the chip and its actions.

attributes.name: deletable
attributes.description: Allows the chip to be deleted, rendering a close icon.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Predefined color variant.

tags.name: mu-dialog
tags.description:
Modal dialog overlay using the native <dialog> element.
Manages focus on open/close, traps focus inside, and closes on Escape.
---


### **Events:**
 - **mu-open** - Dispatched when the dialog finishes opening.
- **mu-close** - Dispatched when the dialog closes (any cause).

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the dialog is currently open. Reflected to attribute.

attributes.name: headline
attributes.description: Text rendered as the dialog headline / title.

tags.name: mu-divider
tags.description:
Divider component to separate content.
---

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: The orientation of the divider.

tags.name: mu-drawer
tags.description:
Side drawer that slides in from the left or right edge of the viewport.
Uses a native `<dialog>` element for focus trapping and Escape handling.
---


### **Events:**
 - **mu-open** - Dispatched after the drawer opens.
- **mu-close** - Dispatched after the drawer closes.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the drawer is visible. Reflects to attribute.

attributes.name: placement
attributes.description: Side from which the drawer slides in.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Width of the drawer panel (any valid CSS length value).

tags.name: mu-locale-provider
tags.description:
Locale provider component that supplies a `MuLocale` object to all
descendant components via the Lit Context API.
When no provider is present in the tree, components fall back to
`defaultLocale` (English).
---

tags.name: mu-icon
tags.description:
Material Icon wrapper component.
Supports size and color props.
---

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Icon name (Material Icons font ligature).

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Icon size: 'small' | 'medium' | 'large' | number (px).

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Predefined color: 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error'.

tags.name: mu-linear-progress
tags.description:
Linear progress bar component.
Supports determinate (value-based) and indeterminate (animated) modes.
---


### **Events:**
 - **mu-complete** - Dispatched when value reaches 100 in determinate mode.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
Progress value from 0 to 100.
Ignored when `indeterminate` is true.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Stroke/fill color of the progress bar. Accepts any valid CSS color.

attributes.name: indeterminate
attributes.description: When true the bar animates indefinitely instead of showing a fixed value.

tags.name: mu-list-item
tags.description:
List item component to be used inside mu-list.
---

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: If true, the list item is disabled.

tags.name: mu-list
tags.description:
List component for continuous vertical indexes.
---

attributes.name: dense
attributes.description: Enables dense mode (reduces padding).

tags.name: mu-pagination
tags.description:
Pagination component for navigating through pages of content.
Emits a `page-change` event when a page button or prev/next is clicked.
---


### **Events:**
 - **page-change** - Detail: `{ page: number }`.

attributes.name: count
attributes.description: Total number of pages.

attributes.name: page
attributes.description: Currently active page (1-based).

attributes.name: siblingCount
attributes.description: Number of sibling pages shown on each side of the current page.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Whether to disable all navigation controls.

tags.name: mu-radio-group
tags.description:
Radio group container that wraps `mu-radio` elements.
Provides `role="radiogroup"` and an accessible group label.
---

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Accessible label for the radio group, referenced by aria-labelledby.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Marks the control as required — at least one radio must be selected.

tags.name: mu-radio
tags.description:
Radio button form component that participates in native HTML forms.
Use inside a `mu-radio-group` for proper grouping and roving tabindex.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Dispatched when this radio becomes selected.

### **Methods:**
 - **focus(): _void_** - Focuses the host element's inner ripple span.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: Whether this radio button is selected.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the radio button, making it non-interactive.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name used to group radio buttons.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Value submitted to the form when this radio is selected.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Visible label rendered next to the radio button. Falls back to default slot.

tags.name: mu-select
tags.description:
Select (dropdown) form component that participates in native HTML forms.
Uses a native `<select>` inside shadow DOM for maximum accessibility.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Dispatched when the selected value changes.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Currently selected value.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Floating label displayed above the select.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the select, making it non-interactive.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Marks the field as required in form validation.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Validation error message. Non-empty string triggers error styling.

attributes.name: options
attributes.description: Array of options to render in the dropdown.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder text shown as the first unselectable option.

tags.name: mu-skeleton
tags.description:
Skeleton placeholder component used to preview content shape before loading.
Renders a pulsing or waving animated placeholder with configurable shape and size.
---

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Shape variant of the skeleton.

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Width of the skeleton element (any valid CSS length value).

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Height of the skeleton element (any valid CSS length value).

attributes.name: animation
attributes.description: Animation style; set to false to disable animation.

tags.name: mu-spinner
tags.description:
Circular progress indicator rendered as an SVG.
Supports both indeterminate (spinning) and determinate (percentage) modes.
---

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Named size of the spinner.

attributes.name: color
attributes.description: Stroke color of the spinning arc. Accepts any valid CSS color value.

attributes.name: value
indeterminate
attributes.description: Whether to spin indefinitely regardless of `value`.

tags.name: mu-snackbar
tags.description:
Snackbar notification component rendered in a fixed bottom-center position.
Auto-dismisses after the configured duration; duration=0 is persistent.
---


### **Events:**
 - **mu-close** - Dispatched when the snackbar is dismissed (any cause).
- **mu-action** - Dispatched when the action button is clicked.

attributes.name: message
attributes.description: Notification message text.

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: Visual severity variant controlling colours and ARIA live region urgency.

attributes.name: duration
attributes.description: Auto-dismiss delay in milliseconds. Use 0 for a persistent snackbar.

attributes.name: open
attributes.description: Whether the snackbar is currently visible. Reflected to attribute.

attributes.name: action-label
attributes.description: Optional label for the call-to-action button. Hidden when empty.

tags.name: mu-switch
tags.description:
Toggle switch form component that participates in native HTML forms.
Supports checked, disabled states and full keyboard accessibility.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Dispatched when the switch is toggled.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: Whether the switch is in the on/checked state.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the switch, making it non-interactive.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form field name submitted with the form.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Value submitted to the form when the switch is on.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Visible label rendered next to the switch. Falls back to default slot.

tags.name: mu-tab-panel
tags.description:
Content panel associated with a `mu-tab`.
Visibility is managed by `mu-tabs`; do not use standalone.
---

attributes.name: active
attributes.description: Whether this panel is currently visible.

attributes.name: labelledby
attributes.description: ID of the `mu-tab` that controls this panel.

tags.name: mu-tab
tags.description:
Individual tab button inside a `mu-tabs` container.
Managed by `mu-tabs`; do not use standalone.
---


### **Events:**
 - **tab-select**

attributes.name: selected
attributes.description: Whether this tab is currently the selected one.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Whether the tab is disabled.

attributes.name: controls
attributes.description:
ID of the `mu-tab-panel` this tab controls.
Set automatically by `mu-tabs`.

tags.name: mu-tabs
tags.description:
Tabs container that manages selection and keyboard navigation across
slotted `mu-tab` and `mu-tab-panel` children.
---


### **Events:**
 - **tab-change** - Dispatched when the selected tab index changes. Detail: `{ index: number }`.

attributes.name: selectedIndex
attributes.description: Zero-based index of the currently selected tab.

tags.name: mu-text-field
tags.description:
Single-line text input form component that participates in native HTML forms.
Wraps a native `<input>` inside shadow DOM with an accessible floating label.
---


### **Events:**
 - **change** - Dispatched when the input loses focus with a changed value.
- **input** - Dispatched on every keystroke (native input event forwarded).

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Current value of the input field.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Floating label displayed above the input when focused or filled.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder text shown inside the input when empty.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: HTML input type controlling keyboard, validation, and rendering.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Disables the text field, making it non-interactive.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: Makes the text field read-only.

attributes.name: required
attributes.description: Marks the field as required in form validation.

attributes.name: error
attributes.description: Validation error message. Non-empty string triggers error styling.

attributes.name: helper-text
attributes.description: Secondary descriptive text shown below the input when no error is present.

tags.name: mu-theme-provider
tags.description:
Theme provider component that applies design tokens to its DOM subtree.
Wrap your application root or a section of UI with this element to enable
theming. Switches between light and dark token sets via the `mode` property.

CSS custom properties are applied directly to the host element's inline style,
so they cascade through both light DOM children and shadow roots of
descendant components.
---

attributes.name: mode
attributes.description: Active color scheme. Switches between the light and dark token sets.

tags.name: mu-tooltip
tags.description:
Tooltip overlay component that reveals a short label near a trigger element.
Displays on hover and keyboard focus with a 300 ms delay.
Uses the Popover API (popover="manual") for top-layer rendering where supported.
---

attributes.name: label
attributes.description: Text content of the tooltip.

attributes.name: placement
attributes.description: Side of the trigger on which the tooltip appears.

tags.name: mu-typography
tags.description:
A typography component that ensures semantic HTML tags and consistent styling.
---

attributes.name: variant
attributes.description: The typography variant which determines the semantic HTML tag and visual style.
